free_text: High precision spectra measurements for neutrons
arising from the fission of Cf-252, U-233, U-235,
Pu-239 in the energy range 0.04 - 5 MeV .
Crystal of 18mm diameter, 4 mm height, methane filled.
Lead filter of 1 mm thickness, 30 mm diameter to
Layers of 20 mm diameter on stainless steel of 0.04 mm
For background due scattered neutrons and delayed
gammas. Contribution of delayed gamma quanta 2%.
Error in the flight base determination-1mm.
Error due to the discrimination level
Free text was corrected to be human-readable.
Errors ERR-1 - ERR-5 were moved in free text.
Free text in STATUS of Subents 9-13 was
deleted according to comments of N.Otsuka (NDS,IAEA).
Subents 006,007 were split into several Subents
for each flight path according to recommendation of
